common.made_by: Made with ☕️ and 🧬️ by Armağan Gök

small_steps.title: Change your life with a small step.
small_steps.description: Developing new habits becomes easier and more sustainable when you start with small, manageable steps with HabitRise.

welcome.try_tapping: Try tapping on the habit card
welcome.journey_begins: Every journey begins with a single step.

routine.title: Routine and repeate help habits take root.
routine.description: Establishing a consistent routine and repeating actions are key to making habits stick with HabitRise.

patience.title: Patience and consistency help habits bear fruit.
patience.description: Forming a habit takes time; enjoying the process is the key with HabitRise.

bad_habits.title: Breaking bad habits is easy. Replace them with good ones.
bad_habits.description: It's much easier to let go of negative habits when you actively replace them with positive and healthy alternatives.

become_person.title: Become The Person You Want To Be
become_person.aristotleHabitQuote: We are what we repeatedly do. Therefore, excellence is not an act, but a habit.

app_features.title: HabitRise Helps You ...
app_features.subtitle: Build lasting habits with smart tracking and personalized insights

smart_tracking.title: Smart Habit Tracking
smart_tracking.description: Track your habits with intelligent reminders and progress visualization. See your streaks grow and celebrate every milestone.

sub_habits.title: Sub-Habits System
sub_habits.description: Break down complex habits into smaller, manageable sub-habits. Build your main habit step by step with micro-actions.

formation_rate.title: Habit Formation Rate
formation_rate.description: Track your habit formation progress with intelligent insights. See how close you are to making your habits stick permanently.

share_habits.title: Share Habits
share_habits.description: Share your habit progress with beautiful, customizable images. Choose from different designs to showcase your achievements.

start_small.title: Start Small & Be Specific
start_small.description: Begin with manageable actions that are easy to incorporate into your daily routine. Instead of "exercise more," try "do 5 push-ups every morning."

make_obvious.title: Make It Obvious
make_obvious.description: Design your environment to make good habits obvious. Place your running shoes by the door, keep a water bottle on your desk, or set visual reminders.

stack_habits.title: Stack Your Habits
stack_habits.description: Link new habits to existing ones. After I brush my teeth, I will meditate for 2 minutes. This creates a strong association that makes habits stick.

make_satisfying.title: Make It Satisfying
make_satisfying.description: Reward yourself immediately after completing your habit. This could be checking off a box, enjoying a favorite song, or celebrating small wins.

track_progress.title: Track Your Progress
track_progress.description: Monitor your habit development to stay motivated. Use HabitRise, journals, or simple checkmarks. Seeing your streak grow creates momentum and accountability.

rating.title:
You've just discovered
HabitRise's unique features
rating.description: To help us reach more people who need help building better habits, would you give our app a review?
rating.feedback_message: Your feedback helps us improve HabitRise and reach more people who need help building better habits.
rating.rate_message: Thank you for your interest in rating HabitRise! You can rate us on the App Store or Google Play Store.

achievement.first_habit_message: Great job! You completed your first habit in the onboarding!

habit_detail.archive_confirmation: Are you sure you want to archive '{{habitName}}'?
habit_detail.archive_info: You can restore it later from the archived habits section.
habit_detail.heatmap_no_data: No data available yet. Start tracking your habit to see the heatmap!
habit_detail.achievement_consistency_description: You're performing at {{percentage}}% of your best streak!
habit_detail.achievement_weekend_description: You maintain great consistency even on weekends!
habit_detail.achievement_weekly_description: You've missed {{days}} days this week. Tomorrow is a fresh start!
habit_detail.achievement_formation_description: You're {{percentage}}% through building this habit. The neural pathways are strengthening!
habit_detail.quote_aristotle: Excellence is not a single act, but a habit. You are not what you do once in a while; you are what you do consistently.
habit_detail.quote_collier: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
habit_detail.quote_twain: The secret to getting ahead is getting started.
habit_detail.quote_lao_tzu: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
habit_detail.heatmap_stats_description: {{days}} days completed in the last year
habit_detail.formation_info_description: The Formation Score shows how likely your habit is to become automatic based on your current completion rate. Higher scores mean your habit is more likely to stick permanently.
habit_detail.formation_info_details: This score is calculated using your consistency patterns and completion rate. Research shows it takes an average of 66 days of regular practice for a habit to become automatic.

habit.calendar_tap_info: Tap on dates to mark or unmark completion

habit_name.title: What habit would you like to build?
habit_name.description: Choose a clear, specific name for your habit. For example: "Drink 8 glasses of water" instead of just "Stay hydrated".

description.title: Tell us more about this habit
description.description: This step is optional. You can add more details about your habit, why it's important to you, or any specific goals you have.

emoji.title: Pick an emoji for your habit
emoji.description: Choose an emoji that represents your habit. This will help you quickly identify it in your habit list.

color.title: Choose a color for your habit
color.preview: Your habit will look like this

category.title: Select categories for your habit
category.description: Categories help you organize your habits and track progress in specific areas of your life. You can select multiple categories.

reminder.title: Reminder for your habit
reminder.description: Reminders are optional but highly recommended. They help you stay consistent by notifying you when it's time to complete your habit.

difficulty.title: Difficulty
difficulty.question: How difficult is this habit to build?
difficulty.info: Choose how challenging this habit feels. We use this to estimate formation time and personalize insights.
difficulty.very_easy_description: Simple habits that require minimal effort and time (e.g., drinking water, taking vitamins)
difficulty.easy_description: Straightforward habits with low physical or mental effort (e.g., making bed, brushing teeth)
difficulty.moderate_description: Habits requiring moderate effort and planning (e.g., reading, light exercise)
difficulty.difficult_description: Challenging habits requiring significant effort and commitment (e.g., intense workouts, learning new skills)
difficulty.very_difficult_description: Very demanding habits requiring high effort, time, and mental strength (e.g., major lifestyle changes)

step_subtitles.habit_name: What habit would you like to build?
step_subtitles.description: Tell us more about this habit (optional)
step_subtitles.emoji: Pick an icon that represents your habit
step_subtitles.color: Choose a color for your habit
step_subtitles.reminder: When would you like to be reminded?
step_subtitles.category: Which category does this habit belong to?
step_subtitles.difficulty: How difficult is this habit to build?

edit_habit.emoji_description: Choose an emoji that represents your habit
edit_habit.habit_name_description: Give your habit a clear, memorable name
edit_habit.habit_description_description: Add details about your habit to stay motivated
edit_habit.difficulty_description: Choose the difficulty level that best matches your habit

settings.data_management_description: Export your habits data to a CSV file for backup or transfer to another device. You can also import previously exported data.
settings.export_description: Export all your habits and their completion data to a CSV file. This file can be used as a backup or to transfer your data to another device.
settings.import_description: Import habits from a previously exported CSV file. This will add or update habits in your current collection.

subscription.unlimitiedHabitsDescription: Add and track unlimited habits effortlessly.
subscription.unlimitiedCustomizationDescription: Customize your habits and settings as you like.
subscription.alwaysUpToDateDescription: Stay updated and access new features regularly.
subscription.upcomingFeaturesDescription: Exciting features you requested are coming soon!
subscription.supportAnIndieDevDescription: Your purchase supports an independent app developer
subscription.statisticsDescription: Track habits, get motivation, be aware of how long time left to make your habit automatic.

reminder.habit_reminder_message: Don't forget to complete your habit!

archived_habits.title: Archived Habits
archived_habits.no_habits_hint: Habits you archive will appear here
archived_habits.delete_selected_message: Are you sure you want to delete {count} habit(s)?
archived_habits.delete_confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to delete this habit:

membership_info.title: Membership Info
membership_info.change_plan_desc: Click to change your subscription plan

statistics.no_data_description: You'll see detailed statistics here when you start tracking your habits.
statistics.formation_info: The percentage above shows how likely your habit is to become automatic based on your current consistency. Higher percentages mean your habit is more likely to stick. According to research, it takes an average of 66 days of regular practice for a habit to become automatic.

formation_status.early: You're still in the early stages. Keep tracking your habit consistently to see meaningful formation progress.
formation_status.excellent: Outstanding progress! With a {percentage}% completion rate, your habit is very likely to become automatic.
formation_status.very_good: Great consistency! With a {percentage}% completion rate, your habit formation is on track.
formation_status.good: Good progress! Your {percentage}% completion rate shows you're building this habit successfully.
formation_status.improving: You're making progress. Try to increase your completion rate to make habit formation more likely.
formation_status.needs_work: Keep working on consistency. Regular completion will help this habit become automatic.

formation_time.not_enough_data: Keep tracking your habit to see formation progress.
formation_time.completed_successful: Congratulations! Your habit is most likely established and automatic.
formation_time.completed_good: Great job! You've completed the formation period with a {percentage}% completion rate. Your habit is likely established.
formation_time.completed_needs_work: You've completed the formation period. Continue with regular practice to strengthen your habit.
formation_time.remaining_days: Estimated {days} days left in the formation period. Keep up the consistent practice.

chart_labels.demo_data_message: This is demo data, upgrade to unlock real data
